architecture.summary: Split lockfile: global ~/.specweave/plugins-lock.json for bundled plugins, project vskill.lock unchanged for user skills. Modify installPlugin() path routing, no new components.

integrations.summary: N/A - internal file I/O only, no external integrations

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI internals only, no user-facing UI changes

performance.summary: N/A - identical file I/O volume, just different paths

security.summary: Minimal - ~/.specweave/ is same trust level as ~/.claude/, no escalation

edge-cases.summary: Migration: move bundled entries from project vskill.lock to global plugins-lock.json on first run. Handle: missing ~/.specweave/ dir, empty vskill.lock after migration, concurrent runs, pre-existing plugins-lock.json merging
